criticalEffect: Chronic oral RfD; immune (decreased child serum antibody tetanus/diphtheria, BMDL 6.04e-8, UF 30) + developmental (decreased birth weight, BMDL 5.44e-8, UF 30); both chronic endpoints converge on 2e-9. Subchronic alternatives (6e-7 hepatic, 1e-6 repro-F, 3e-6 repro-M) NOT promoted.
